details.description: This location provides: seating assistance, lost and found, guest comment forms, first event certificates, charging stations, and more. Looking for a lost item? Call the Guest Services Hotline or email to info@metlifestadium.com.
details.name: Guest Services Booth

details.description: To reduce touchpoints, MetLife Stadium is a cash-free venue. NO CASH will be accepted at concession stands and retail locations. Pay with a debit or credit card (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover) using tap to pay, chip or swipe, or mobile payment, including Apple Pay and Google Pay.
details.name: Reverse ATM
